error_signature: unable to extract values from form field component
title: Cannot extract values from custom form field component
symptom: The user is unable to retrieve values entered in a custom form field component when it is used within a collection item.
applies_when: Using a custom form field component
Values need to be extracted for further processing
not_this_if: Values are being extracted correctly from other components
The component is not used in a collection item
root_cause: The custom form component does not automatically expose its internal values to the outside context. Without proper variable exposure and event handling, the values remain inaccessible.
fix_steps: Create a component variable within the custom form component and ensure it is visible outside the component.
Set up an 'on change' event workflow on the input field to execute a workflow that links to the component workflow.
Create a workflow for the component that triggers on execution and includes an action to change the component variable to the input field's value.
agent_instruction: Follow the steps to create a variable and set up workflows to expose the input values outside the component.
